title: Complete required document uploads and proceed to province selection
description: Verifies a customer can upload all required property documents, review extracted fields, and continue to the province selection step.

steps.description: Upload a valid image for the DNI/NIE front document
Upload a valid image for the DNI/NIE back document
Upload a valid image or PDF for the IBI document
Upload a valid image for the electricity bill document
Verify the province selection step is displayed

title: Assessor can log in and see project list
description: Verifies an assessor can authenticate to the dashboard with the correct password and sees the list of submitted projects.

steps.description: Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Verify the dashboard displays a list of projects

title: Start session by phone and route into the project form
description: Verifies a customer can enter a valid Spanish mobile number and is redirected into an active project session with the correct form section displayed.

steps.description: Fill +34612345678 into the phone number field
Verify the user is redirected into a project session and a form section is displayed

title: Submit from review and see success confirmation
description: Verifies a customer can submit a completed review and sees the success confirmation section.

title: Select Cataluña and proceed to representation
description: Verifies a customer can choose Cataluña from the province list and continue to the representation step.

steps.description: Verify the representation step is displayed

title: Apply signatures and continue to next step
description: Verifies a customer can inject a test signature, apply required signatures to legal PDFs, and successfully proceed to the next step.

steps.description: Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature() in the browser console context
Verify the user proceeds past the representation step to the next section

title: Require DNI back before allowing continuation
description: Verifies the form blocks progress when only the DNI front is uploaded and allows progress after the DNI back is uploaded.

steps.description: Upload a valid image for the DNI/NIE front document
Verify a validation error is visible indicating the DNI/NIE back is required
Upload a valid image for the DNI/NIE back document
Verify the province selection step is displayed

title: Review checklist item navigation returns to review after fix
description: Verifies a customer can open a checklist item from review, complete the required action, and return to review able to submit.

steps.description: Click an incomplete checklist item to navigate to its related step
Complete the required fields or actions for that step
Proceed forward to return to the review step
Verify the review-submit action is available to submit

title: Assessor can open a project detail modal from the list
description: Verifies an assessor can open a project’s detail modal from the dashboard list and see project details.

steps.description: Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Verify the project detail modal is displayed

title: Skip energy certificate survey and reach review
description: Verifies a customer can skip the energy certificate survey and is taken to the review step.

steps.description: Verify the user proceeds to the review step

title: Complete 4-step energy certificate survey and reach review
description: Verifies a customer can complete all four survey steps and confirm to reach the review step.

steps.description: Fill valid housing data into the step 1 fields
Fill valid openings data into the step 2 fields
Fill valid thermal systems data into the step 3 fields
Fill valid additional info into the step 4 fields
Verify the user proceeds to the review step

title: Show not-found error for unrecognized phone number
description: Verifies that submitting an unrecognized phone number shows a user-facing error and does not start a project session.

steps.description: Fill +34600000000 into the phone number field
Verify a phone lookup not-found error is visible

title: Assessor can view project assets and extracted data in the modal
description: Verifies an assessor can inspect a project in the detail modal and see uploaded assets and extracted data displayed.

steps.description: Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Verify uploaded project assets are displayed in the modal
Verify extracted data is displayed in the modal

title: Defer signing and continue
description: Verifies a customer can defer legal signing and still proceed to the next step without applying signatures.

steps.description: Verify the user proceeds past the representation step to the next section

title: Navigate back from province selection to property documents
description: Verifies the back control in province selection returns the customer to the property documents step.

steps.description: Verify the property documents step is displayed

title: Back and next navigation works within the survey
description: Verifies a customer can move forward and backward between energy certificate steps without leaving the survey.

steps.description: Fill valid housing data into the step 1 fields
Verify the survey returns to step 1

title: Back navigation returns to previous step from representation
description: Verifies a customer can navigate back from the representation step to the prior section without breaking the flow.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the previous section in the flow

title: Submit is gated until all required review items are complete
description: Verifies the review step blocks submission when required items are incomplete and allows submission once all are completed.

steps.description: Click an incomplete checklist item to navigate to its related step
Verify the review-submit action is not available while required items are incomplete

title: Signing is required to enable continue when not deferring
description: Verifies the continue action is blocked until a signature is provided when the user chooses to apply signatures.

steps.description: Verify the user remains on the representation step and cannot proceed

title: Assessor can export the project list as CSV
description: Verifies an assessor can export the dashboard project list as a CSV from the dashboard UI.

steps.description: Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Verify a CSV export is initiated

title: Assessor can log out and return to dashboard login screen
description: Verifies an authenticated assessor can end the dashboard session and is returned to the login screen.

steps.description: Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Verify the dashboard login screen is displayed

title: Continue remains enabled after applying signatures once
description: Verifies that after applying a test signature, the representation step reflects a completed state that allows continuing again without re-signing.

steps.description: Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature() in the browser console context
Click the control to return to the representation step from the next section
Verify the representation step indicates signing is completed and the user can proceed

title: Cannot confirm survey with missing required fields on final step
description: Verifies the survey prevents confirmation when required fields are incomplete on the final step.

steps.description: Fill valid housing data into the step 1 fields
Fill valid openings data into the step 2 fields
Fill valid thermal systems data into the step 3 fields
Verify a validation error is visible and the user remains on the final survey step

title: Assessor can open an asset preview from the project modal
description: Verifies an assessor can use the view action for an asset from the project modal and an asset preview view is opened.

steps.description: Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Verify an asset preview is displayed
